scripts.dev: bun run dev:check && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run dev:backend" "bun run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:check: bun run setup:env && bun run setup:deps
scripts.dev:backend: cd server && bash -c '(test -d venv || python3 -m venv venv) && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/server.py'
scripts.backend: cd server && source venv/bin/activate && python3 src/server.py
scripts.setup: bun run setup:env && bun run setup:backend && bun run setup:frontend && bun run setup:done
scripts.setup:env:
test -f server/.env.local || (cp server/.env.example server/.env.local && echo '
⚠️  Created server/.env.local - Please edit and fill in your credentials!' && echo '   Required: APP_ID, APP_CERTIFICATE, API_KEY, API_SECRET, LLM_API_KEY, etc.
')
scripts.setup:deps: test -d web/node_modules || (echo 'Installing frontend dependencies...' && cd web && bun install)
scripts.setup:backend: cd server && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.org/simple pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:done:
echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next steps:' && echo '   1. Edit server/.env.local with your credentials' && echo '   2. Run: bun run dev
'
scripts.clean: bun run clean:backend && bun run clean:frontend
